nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Located behind the corpus callosum, the Pineal Gland regulates the sleep and wake cycles.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Kael opens his eyes and finds himself in an unfamiliar world. You arrive at the Pineal Gland, the realm hidden behind the corpus callosum that governs the cycle of sleep and wakefulness.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Where am I...? What is this place?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Kael? How did you get here?

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who are you?! How do you know my name?

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You see a vibrant pink creature standing in a surreal world unlike anything you have ever seen.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: This has to be a dream...

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: I guess, technically, it is...? I'm Rona, an Energeon.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Ah! You being here must mean something! Stop asking questions and come with me!
